<!DOCTYPE qgis PUBLIC 'http://mrcc.com/qgis.dtd' 'SYSTEM'>
<qgis version="3.34.15-Prizren">
  <identifier>Physiographic_Regions</identifier>
  <parentidentifier></parentidentifier>
  <language>ENG</language>
  <type>dataset</type>
  <title>Physiographic Regions of Kentucky</title>
  <abstract>Physiographic regions of Kentucky. Adapted from Armin Kohl Lobeck's physiographic diagram of Kentucky in 'The Midland Trail in Kentucy': a physiographic and geologic guide book to US Highway 60. KGS Report Series 6, pamphlet 23, Frankfort, 1930.

Physiographic regions of Kentucky</abstract>
  <keywords vocabulary="Search keys">
    <keyword>land use</keyword>
    <keyword>geology</keyword>
    <keyword>region</keyword>
    <keyword>economy</keyword>
    <keyword>KGS</keyword>
    <keyword>geoscientificInformation</keyword>
    <keyword>planning</keyword>
    <keyword>physiography</keyword>
    <keyword>Kentucky</keyword>
  </keywords>
  <keywords vocabulary="gmd:topicCategory">
    <keyword>land use</keyword>
    <keyword>geology</keyword>
    <keyword>region</keyword>
    <keyword>economy</keyword>
    <keyword>KGS</keyword>
    <keyword>geoscientificInformation</keyword>
    <keyword>planning</keyword>
    <keyword>physiography</keyword>
  </keywords>
  <contact>
    <contactAddress>
      <type>both</type>
      <address>Kentucky Geological Survey</address>
      <city>Lexington</city>
      <administrativearea>KY</administrativearea>
      <postalcode>40506-0107</postalcode>
      <country></country>
    </contactAddress>
    <name>Dan Carey</name>
    <organization>Kentucky Geological Survey</organization>
    <position></position>
    <voice>859-257-5500</voice>
    <fax></fax>
    <email>carey@uky.edu</email>
    <role>Point of contact</role>
  </contact>
  <links/>
  <dates>
    <date type="Published" value="2000-01-01T00:00:00"/>
  </dates>
  <fees></fees>
  <constraints type="Security constraints"></constraints>
  <rights>Kentucky Geological Survey (KGS)</rights>
  <encoding></encoding>
  <crs>
    <spatialrefsys nativeFormat="Wkt">
      <wkt>PROJCRS["NAD83 / Kentucky Single Zone (ftUS)",BASEGEOGCRS["NAD83",DATUM["North American Datum 1983",ELLIPSOID["GRS 1980",6378137,298.257222101,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433]],ID["EPSG",4269]],CONVERSION["SPCS83 Kentucky Single Zone (US survey foot)",METHOD["Lambert Conic Conformal (2SP)",ID["EPSG",9802]],PARAMETER["Latitude of false origin",36.3333333333333,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8821]],PARAMETER["Longitude of false origin",-85.75,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8822]],PARAMETER["Latitude of 1st standard parallel",37.0833333333333,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8823]],PARAMETER["Latitude of 2nd standard parallel",38.6666666666667,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8824]],PARAMETER["Easting at false origin",4921250,LENGTHUNIT["US survey foot",0.304800609601219],ID["EPSG",8826]],PARAMETER["Northing at false origin",3280833.333,LENGTHUNIT["US survey foot",0.304800609601219],ID["EPSG",8827]]],CS[Cartesian,2],AXIS["easting (X)",east,ORDER[1],LENGTHUNIT["US survey foot",0.304800609601219]],AXIS["northing (Y)",north,ORDER[2],LENGTHUNIT["US survey foot",0.304800609601219]],USAGE[SCOPE["State-wide spatial data management."],AREA["United States (USA) - Kentucky."],BBOX[36.49,-89.57,39.15,-81.95]],ID["EPSG",3089]]</wkt>
      <proj4>+proj=lcc +lat_0=36.3333333333333 +lon_0=-85.75 +lat_1=37.0833333333333 +lat_2=38.6666666666667 +x_0=1500000 +y_0=999999.9998984 +datum=NAD83 +units=us-ft +no_defs</proj4>
      <srsid>1052</srsid>
      <srid>3089</srid>
      <authid>EPSG:3089</authid>
      <description>NAD83 / Kentucky Single Zone (ftUS)</description>
      <projectionacronym>lcc</projectionacronym>
      <ellipsoidacronym>EPSG:7019</ellipsoidacronym>
      <geographicflag>false</geographicflag>
    </spatialrefsys>
  </crs>
  <extent>
    <spatial minx="-89.70440600000000586" dimensions="2" minz="0" maxz="0" crs="EPSG:3089" maxx="-81.88442100000000323" maxy="39.15189000000000163" miny="36.45696800000000337"/>
    <temporal>
      <period>
        <start>2000-01-01T05:00:00Z</start>
        <end></end>
      </period>
    </temporal>
    <temporal>
      <period>
        <start></start>
        <end></end>
      </period>
    </temporal>
  </extent>
</qgis>
